prompt: Trace the early history of the Cedarvale School Archive in Cedarvale. First identify its authoritative custodian, then fetch an official accession note or institutional history that states where the collection was originally housed. Do not confuse the founding site with its current address. Verify only the original location; do not research the current address or speculate about why the collection moved.

fetch_primary.title: Cedarvale School Archive accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Cedarvale School Archive began in the headteacher's office in the old Grove School. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.
